     The Numbers Business Report

Afraid (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $6,726,179Details
International Box Office $2,299,958
Worldwide Box Office $9,026,137
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $12,400
Total $12,400
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Curtis and his family are selected to test a revolutionary new home device: a digital family assistant called AIA. Taking smart home to the next level, once the unit and its sensors and cameras are installed in their home, AIA seems able to do it all. She learns the family’s behaviors and begins to anticipate their needs. And she can make sure nothing — and no one — gets in her family’s way.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$3,665,664 (54.5% of total gross)
Legs:1.83 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:74.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$12,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,003 opening theaters/3,003 max. theaters, 2.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $7,112,744

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 30th, 2024 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: August 28th, 2024 (Wide), released as L’I.A. du mal (France)
August 29th, 2024 (Wide) (Australia)
August 29th, 2024 (Wide) (Germany)
August 29th, 2024 (Wide) (Brazil)
August 29th, 2024 (Wide) (Czech Republic)
Video Release: September 17th, 2024 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sexual material, some strong violence, some strong language, and thematic material.
(Rating bulletin 2843 (cert #55071), 7/17/2024)
Running Time: 84 minutes
Filming location (city or town): Los Angeles, CA
Filming location (country): United States
Filming location (state or county): California, United States
Plot point: Artificial Intelligence
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Depth of Field, Columbia Pictures, Blumhouse, Sony Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Curtis and his family are selected to test a revolutionary new home device: a digital family assistant called AIA. Taking smart home to the next level, once the unit and its sensors and cameras are installed in their home, AIA seems able to do it all. She learns the family’s behaviors and begins to anticipate their needs. And she can make sure nothing — and no one — gets in her family’s way.
